headline: Carrier Accelerates Intelligent Building Strategy with Acquisition of 75F
summary: Carrier Global Corporation (NYSE: CARR), global leader in intelligent climate and energy solutions, today announced it has acquired 75F, a leading innovator in cloud-native, wireless, AI-enabled building automation systems. The acquisition strengthens Carrier's intelligent building capabilities across applications — from complex applied systems and high-growth data centers to light commercial and retrofits.

headline: How Earnings Pressure and Slowing Organic Growth Could Recast Carrier Global’s (CARR) Acquisition-Driven Story
summary: Carrier Global recently faced reports that its June-quarter earnings and revenue declined from a year earlier, with analysts trimming estimates and expressing caution about the upcoming results. Commentary also emphasized the company’s lack of organic revenue growth and falling earnings per share over the past two years, raising questions about the effectiveness of its acquisition-led expansion. We’ll now examine how the expectation of weaker quarterly earnings and revenues might reshape...

headline: Carrier Global (CARR) Faces Earnings Pressure, Is An 11% Discount Enough?
summary: Carrier Global (CARR) is in focus after expectations for its upcoming quarterly report point to a year-over-year decline in earnings and revenue, with a negative Earnings ESP raising questions about near term profitability trends. See our latest analysis for Carrier Global. At a share price of $68.10, Carrier Global has seen its 1-day share price return rise 2.11%, but its 30-day share price return is down 5.22%. The 3-year total shareholder return of 30.32% points to momentum that has built...
